issue_description: Add transition-related fields to PhaseDefinition and PipelineTemplate. New PhaseOutcome enum, transitions dict, max_iterations fields, and _phase_map for O(1) lookups.
acceptance_criteria: New PhaseOutcome enum in a new module src/orchestration_engine/transitions.py: SUCCESS, FAILED, TIMEOUT, SKIPPED
PhaseDefinition gains: transitions: Dict[str, str] = {} (outcome string → phase_id), max_iterations: int = 0 (0 = use pipeline default)
PipelineTemplate gains: default_transitions: Dict[str, str] = {}, max_iterations: int = 10 (must be > 0)
YAML loader parses transitions, max_iterations, default_transitions from template files
PhaseSequencer.__init__ builds self._phase_map: Dict[str, PhaseDefinition] for O(1) lookups
Replace all calls to self._get_phase(phase_id) with self._phase_map[phase_id] lookups
Backward compatible: templates without transitions load unchanged, max_iterations defaults to 10
All new fields have None-normalization in __post_init__
Comprehensive tests for field parsing, defaults, None handling, _phase_map lookups
codebase_context: PhaseDefinition is a @dataclass in src/orchestration_engine/templates.py (line ~60). PipelineTemplate is at line ~115. PhaseSequencer is in src/orchestration_engine/sequencer.py. The _get_phase() method does a linear scan of template.phases. The YAML loader is TemplateEngine.load_template(). Fields are parsed in the _load_template_data region around line 370+. Phase-level fields are listed in the _KNOWN_PHASE_FIELDS set around line 410.
files_to_modify: src/orchestration_engine/templates.py — add transitions, max_iterations, default_transitions fields + YAML parsing
constraints: PhaseOutcome should be a string enum (class PhaseOutcome(str, Enum)) for easy YAML/JSON serialization
transitions dict keys are lowercase outcome strings: 'success', 'failed', 'timeout', 'skipped'
transitions dict values are phase ID strings
max_iterations on PipelineTemplate must validate > 0 in __post_init__
max_iterations on PhaseDefinition: 0 means use pipeline default, > 0 means override
Do NOT remove the old _get_phase() method — keep it as a fallback but add _phase_map as primary
